In the face of ridicule and even at the peril of his life, Noah remained steadfast to the principles of the priesthood. The scriptures describe Noah’s devotion in these simple, straightforward terms: “Thus did Noah; according to all that God commanded him, so did he.” (Gen. 6:22 [Genesis 6:22].) (Robert L.
